title: New York DDS Pay-Scale Research Notes (Blocked — cs.ny.gov / PEF schedule pending)
description: Narrative research notes for New York DDS pay: administering agency (NY OTDA Division of Disability Determinations), verified Disability Analyst series (Trainee, 1, 2) and supervisor classification, the NY Salary Grade (SG) system (SG 8–27+, ~9 steps), PEF Bargaining Unit 5 (PS&T) CBA (Apr-2023 → Apr-2026, 4% raise eff Apr-2025), and documented data gaps (SG numbers, min/max, step amounts all require cs.ny.gov / PEF schedule access that was paywalled/network-blocked). Companion to NY/scheduled-rates.json.

source.publisher: NY Department of Civil Service / PEF (Public Employees Federation); NY Office of Temporary and Disability Assistance (OTDA) Division of Disability Determinations
source.title: NY DDS salary research notes (cs.ny.gov + PEF salary schedule access-restricted 2026-05-08)

notes: Browser-fetch pending: classification titles (Disability Analyst Trainee/1/2), PEF Bargaining Unit 5 (PS&T), and CBA dates are VERIFIED, but SG numbers, min/max salaries, and step amounts are PENDING — cs.ny.gov has an HTML paywall and pef.org/openbook.ny.gov failed to fetch. Schedule eff 2025-07-01, CBA through 2026-04-01 → temporal_coverage. Manual fetch: cs.ny.gov salary schedules or pef.org salary charts.
